squad_skills.name: Brave
squad_skills.description: +1 to all Morale tests. Cumulative with Motivator sergeant skill.

squad_skills.name: Tank Hunters
squad_skills.description: One figure per activation may take a 'Tank Killer' shot: only 1 shot but +1 to Hit and +1 damage. Declare before firing.

squad_skills.name: Keen Shots
squad_skills.description: All figures add +6" to range when firing rifles. One rifle shot per activation may add +1 to Hit after rolling.

squad_skills.name: Die-hards
squad_skills.description: When deploying, pick one figure (not sergeant) that receives +1 KP. Does not have to be the same figure each game.

squad_skills.name: Fire Drill
squad_skills.description: If the squad does not move when activating, may add Combat Skill to Hit roll when firing on Overwatch.

squad_skills.name: Brawlers
squad_skills.description: In close assault, any 1 on the attack dice may be rerolled once.

squad_skills.name: Fearless
squad_skills.description: The squad becomes Fearless (immune to Fear, reroll failed Morale on 4+).

squad_skills.name: Bombers
squad_skills.description: Two figures per activation may throw grenades (normally 1). Grenade range +2". +1 damage vs vehicles with grenades.

squad_skills.name: Guerillas
squad_skills.description: The squad may fire pistols and rifles while Dashing. Hits only on natural 6.

squad_skills.name: Quick
squad_skills.description: The squad moves +4" when Dashing, instead of +2".

sergeant_skills.name: Parry
sergeant_skills.description: Once per close assault, force one incoming assault targeting the sergeant to be rerolled.

sergeant_skills.name: Motivator
sergeant_skills.description: +1 to all Morale tests for the squad. Cumulative with Brave squad skill.

sergeant_skills.name: Fighter
sergeant_skills.description: The sergeant receives two attacks in close assault combat.

sergeant_skills.name: Survivor
sergeant_skills.description: Any time a Hit is inflicted on the sergeant, roll 1D6. On 5-6, it has no effect.

sergeant_skills.name: Tactics
sergeant_skills.description: The squad counts as +1 to Reactions.

sergeant_skills.name: Experience Eye
sergeant_skills.description: The sergeant receives +1 to Hit with all ranged attacks.

sergeant_skills.name: Alert
sergeant_skills.description: When making Observation rolls, the sergeant can spot at +3".

sergeant_note: Any sergeant receiving a veteran skill also becomes Fearless. Skills that benefit the squad apply only if the sergeant is alive.

individual_skills.name: Gun-slinging
individual_skills.description: May use two pistols simultaneously. Both shots must target the same unit.

individual_skills.name: Quick Feet
individual_skills.description: Dash move bonus equals normal speed instead of +2".

individual_skills.name: Deadly Accuracy
individual_skills.description: May reroll any 1 on initial dice when making any type of attack.

individual_skills.name: Lucky
individual_skills.description: The character receives a 6+ Saving Throw.

individual_skills.name: Skilled Leader
individual_skills.description: Must have Leader type. Morale bonus applies within 9" instead of normal range.

individual_skills.name: Expert Fighter
individual_skills.description: Receives one additional close combat attack.

gun_crew_skills.name: Defend the Guns
gun_crew_skills.description: When defending close assault, each figure may strike twice when rolling to hit.

gun_crew_skills.name: Fortified Positions
gun_crew_skills.description: The gun crew receives a 6+ Saving Throw against all Hits.

gun_crew_skills.name: Deploy Hidden
gun_crew_skills.description: Until the crew fires for the first time, they are Hidden and must be spotted with Observation.

gun_crew_skills.name: Gun Drill
gun_crew_skills.description: The gun crew may reroll a single Hit die.

gun_crew_skills.name: Redeployment
gun_crew_skills.description: When moving, crew may move 2" per crew figure, max 6".

gun_crew_skills.name: Target Selection
gun_crew_skills.description: May ignore normal target selection rules and fire at any squad or vehicle in sight.

vehicle_skills.name: Gunnery
vehicle_skills.description: When main weapon fires, natural 6s on Hit dice allow a single additional shot at the same targets.

vehicle_skills.name: Driving
vehicle_skills.description: The vehicle may turn one additional time per move.

vehicle_skills.name: Damage Control
vehicle_skills.description: If immobilized, when activated roll 1D6. On 5-6, regains mobility.

vehicle_skills.name: Defensive Measures
vehicle_skills.description: Attempts to Hit the vehicle during close assault are at -1 to Hit.

vehicle_note: Veteran vehicle crew cannot use their skill while dismounted. Crews can only apply their skill to the same broad class of vehicle they were crewing when they became veterans.
